description.content: Customer and supplier contact management
Returns a paginated list of contacts (customers and suppliers). Supports filtering by contact type, search term, and date ranges.

query.description: Filter by contact type IDs (CUSTOMER, SUPPLIER)
Search contacts by name or reference

Sage Accounting API (v3.1) is a RESTful web service that connects software to Sage's cloud accounting platform. Supports Sage Business Cloud Accounting and Sage Business Cloud Start products. Covers contacts, sales and purchase invoices, payments, bank accounts, ledger accounts, products/services, and financial reporting. Uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication. Rate limits apply: 1,296,000 daily requests, 150 concurrent, 100 per minute per company.

Contact Support:
 Name: Sage Developer Support
